section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom/history item, not an exam or test finding.
Chest pain here is described as a patient report, which belongs in the symptom/history narrative rather than the objective findings section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor advises the patient to quarantine for 10 days.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Quarantine advice implies an infectious assessment (e.g., suspected viral illness) that is not documented in the Assessment section; while it is an instruction and thus acceptable in Plan, the lack of a corresponding infectious diagnosis or problem in Assessment creates organizational inconsistency.
